name: ClickUp
description: Task and project management platform with workspaces, tasks, docs, goals, time tracking and integrations.

auth_methods.note: Official docs describe OAuth 2.0 for third-party apps and a Personal API Token (used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header).

credential_access.note: ClickUp Help Center shows self-serve steps to generate an API Token from within the product UI (Avatar → Settings → Apps → API Token → Generate). The page does not state any paid-plan requirement, so access appears self-serve; confidence remains medium because the doc does not explicitly confirm Free-plan eligibility.

api_surface.note: Official developer docs describe a RESTful API covering Spaces, Folders, Lists, Tasks, Comments, Users, Teams, Goals, Time Tracking and more (broad coverage).

buildability.note: Public REST API docs are available and users can generate personal API tokens via their profile for immediate testing. OAuth app registration is available in the developer console for multi-user apps.

queries: ClickUp API documentation site:clickup.com api ClickUp API docs
ClickUp personal API token generate site:developer.clickup.com "personal token" or "personal_api_token" "How to get" "API token"
site:help.clickup.com "How to get your API Token" ClickUp
ClickUp API partnership contact sales site:clickup.com OR site:developer.clickup.com OR site:help.clickup.com
